titleStmt.title: SII 27.251: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 251. (A.R. No. 530 of 1928-29.) KORAGA, KARKAL TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in a rice field near the village.
Vīra Bhairava 1408 A.D. and Pāṇḍya Bhūpala.

The record registers a gift of land in the village, Marṇe for the worship and offering to god Pārśvanātha and for feeding the ṛishis, by the chief Vīra-Bhairava and his son Pāṇḍya-bhūpāla who were ruling from Keravase. The basti was got constructed by the chief in Chōḷiyakēri at rājadhāni Bārakūru. The gift was made at the instance of Vasantakīrtirāu7ḷa.
It is dated Śaka 1331, Sarvadhāri, Pushya śu. 10, Thursday. The tithi corresponds to 1408 A.D., December 27, Thursday, f.d.t. ·22.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparama gaṁbhīra syādvādāmōpha lāṁchanaṁ . jīyātrailō
kyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya pruthvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍa
lēśvararuṁ Uttaramadhurādhīśvararuṁ paṭṭipoṁbucchapuravarādhīśvararuṁ padmāvatī
labdhavaraprasādādita vipula tulāpuruṣa mahādāna hiraṁṇyagaccha(tra)
trayādhigadānaruṁ vānaradhvajamrugarāja lāṁchana virājita mahōgravaṁśa lalāma
ruṁ jinadattānvaya kumudinīśaraścaṁdraruṁ bahukaḷā saṁpaṁnnaruṁ jinapāda pa
dmārādhakaruṁ samyaktaratnākararumappa śrī vīrabhairavakṣmāpālakaruṁ Avara ku
māra pāṁḍya bhūpālaru saha keravaseyeṁba mahārājadhāni yoḷuttarōttarābhi
vṛddhiyiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta mahārājadhāni bārakūra coḷiyakēriyalli tāu mā
ḍisida bastiyalli pārśvadēvarapratiṣṭheyanu māḍisi Ādēvara Amrutapaḍi naṁdādīvige ni
tyābhiṣēka ruṣiyarāhāradāna modalāda dharmmakke manneya grāmadoḷage dhārā
pūrvvakavāgi śāsanasthavamāḍi koṭṭa dharmma śakavaruṣa 1331 neya sarvvadhāri saṁvatsa
rada puṣya su 10 guruvāradaṁdu balātkāra gaṇada vasaṁtakīrttirāuḷara Anugñeyaṁ
viṁgaḍisikoṭṭa kṣētra Okkala vivara Ājakāra haravariya sīmeseṭṭittiya Aruvārada bā
ḷiṁ baḍagalu dēvarāḷuvage koṭṭa gaddeyiṁ mūḍalu vasaṁtara puttaḷakeyiṁ teṁkalu Āṁ
ntī catusīme yoḷagāda haravarige saluva makkemarasuggi mukkeyiṁ hāni 30 lekkada bha
tta mūḍe 100 piriyaṭṭina haravariyiṁ bārakūra ga 3 bhattamuḍe 100 gōḷitaḍuka
dali pāṁḍyappa sēnabōvara bāḷiṁda kāṭiga 2 nannaṁgaṭṭada malarāya Urbbaḷiya bāḷa kā
ṭi ga 3 mādurbbaḷiya mūla Āruvārada bāḷiṁ ga 7 kiṁnnakaṁṇana mūla Āruvārada
bāḷiṁ ga 1 moyilajjekuṁjata beṭiṁ bhaṭṭa nāraṇa yīśvarabhaṭṭagaḷa Aruvāra mūlada bā
ḷiṁ ga 5 bhattamūḍe 3 Ā moIlajeya dāmōdara viṣṇugaḷa Aruvāra mūlada bāḷiṁga 7Þ2
pa 30 beṭṭige Ā viṣṇuviṁ Þ 6 moI Ajje kaḍaṁbarabeṭṭi
bāli viṣṇuvina bāḷiṁ ga 1Þ4 Ā bageya paḍupina vādyagiṁ 84 kaṁḍabara beṭṭina paramēśvara Aṁṇa
dēvagaḷa bāḷiṁ 12 jōḷipāḍeya cokkabhaṭṭana bāḷiṁ ga 10Þ4 baṁṇa jārama vāṇikriṣṇana
bāḷiṁ 86 paḍupina viṣṇurbbaḷiya bāḷiṁ gaÞ4 bhatta mū 50 bēlūra Aḍḍaṇabeṁmaḷuvana
mūlada bāḷiṁ ga 1 bōyiṁbeṭṭa viṣṇurbbaḷiya bāḷiṁ bhattamuḍe 30 tikamarāmagaḷa bā
ḷiṁ bhatta mu Þ Aḍukaṭe gōviṁdanabāḷiṁ bhatta mu 10 narasiṁhaheggaḍe dēvara dhūpake kajji
nāraṇage jiṇijāralu dāmōdarana bāḷu baḍagaṇa bāḷiṁ Þ2 Aṁntu bārakūraga 5182 hāni
30 lekada bhattamūḍe 300 nū kālakālake hadinaidokkalu naḍisi bahaṁtāgi māḍikoṭa dharmmaśāsana
yī dharmmadokkalige Aṁnyāya Anucitavilla sarvvamāṁnya [kātu bi]saṁtaru Avara Aḷiya ba
baradappanā kūḍi dēvara gaṁdhada dharmmakke taṁma mūlada voḷakaṁ gaṭṭidabāṇa kāṭiya bāḷiga 1
dānapālanayōrmmadhyēśrēyōbhavatu pālanaṁ dānaṁ svarggamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ . Akṣaya
vī dharmama nīkṣēpa rakṣisida puṁṇya puruṣarggakkuṁ bhakṣisidātana saṁtānakṣayamaṁ kṣayaṁ
kalakṣaya makkuṁ . yi 15 Okkala bāḷu Oṁdu śrī śrī śrī
Ādi ya māḍida dharmadēvara nityābhiṣēkakke
The last two lines are
Digital edition of SII 27.251 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
